title: SaaS Analytics Dashboard
description: Built a modular dashboard with reusable chart components and role-based navigation for operations teams.
outcome: Reduced reporting time by 38% across internal operations.

title: Conversion-Focused Landing System
description: Designed and implemented a landing page system that improved trial signups through rapid A/B experimentation.
outcome: Increased trial conversion by 17% in two release cycles.

title: Developer Portfolio Engine
description: Created a content-driven personal site architecture where projects and blogs are managed from data files.
outcome: Cut content update effort from hours to minutes.

title: Customer Onboarding Workspace
description: Shipped a guided onboarding suite with progressive setup, templates, and account health scoring.

title: Headless Blog Delivery Pipeline
description: Built a markdown-to-JSON publishing flow with typed validation and preview routes for editors.
outcome: Reduced publishing errors by 62% with schema checks.

title: Realtime Incident Console
description: Implemented a realtime monitoring console with alerts, status timelines, and incident ownership workflows.
outcome: Cut mean incident acknowledgement time by 29%.
